.canvas-card-menu.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.file-embed.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

a.external-link[data-tooltip-position=\".background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0) none no-repeat scroll 100% 4px / 13.2px padding-box border-box

blockquote.background: rgba(49, 52, 53, 0.65) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

blockquote::before.background: rgb(89, 89, 89) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
blockquote::before.font-family: "??", "??", ui-sans-serif, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, system-ui, "Segoe UI", "Google Sans Flex", Roboto, "Inter Variable", Inter, "Apple Color Emoji", "Segoe UI Emoji", "Segoe UI Symbol", sans-serif

body.--blur-background: color-mix(in srgb, #313435A6 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#313435A6, color-mix(in srgb, #313435A6 65%, transparent))
body.--raised-background: color-mix(in srgb, #313435A6 65%, transparent) linear-gradient(#313435A6, color-mix(in srgb, #313435A6 65%, transparent))
body.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(0, 0, 0) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

code.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-active.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(12, 12, 12) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
